blockingIssues.description: `sampleEdgeHeavy` hard-caps sign-pattern coverage at 15 axes, so valid packs with 16+ shared axes never sample positive boundaries for higher-index axes.
JSON import accepts proto-persona axis keys that are missing from the pack's `sharedAxes`, allowing invalid persona packs to be persisted.
`publish` freezes packs without revalidating proto-persona axis keys against the current `sharedAxes`, so drift introduced during draft edits can be published.
Archived packs remain in the same active grid without any real demotion, so the UI does not satisfy the archive-demotion requirement.
Generation can terminate with fewer than `runBudget` accepted variants and then stay permanently short because reruns early-return when rows already exist.
Rejected fallback variants can persist out-of-range `coherenceScore` values, violating the required `[0,1]` invariant and skewing best-candidate selection.

appliedUpdates.description: Removed stale guidance from `.factory/library/environment.md` that still listed `convex-helpers` as not yet installed.
Documented in `.factory/library/architecture.md` that frontend tests can use `getFunctionName` from `convex/server` to discriminate generated Convex function refs at runtime.

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Allow a targeted failing test run to satisfy the RED step, with full-suite validation still required before handoff.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: The `persona-pure-logic` review found the worker established RED with `bun run test convex/personaEngine/pure.test.ts`, which matched efficient TDD practice even though the skill currently requires a full `bun run test` for RED.

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Allow focused failing test-file runs to satisfy the RED step when the worker is adding backend coverage in an existing green repository, while keeping final full-suite validation mandatory.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: The `preview-variants` review found the worker had to prove RED with `bunx vitest run convex/personaVariantGeneration.test.ts` after the full suite initially passed, showing the current RED wording is too rigid for incremental backend work.

rejectedObservations.observation: Document a 15-axis shared-axis ceiling for edge sampling.
rejectedObservations.reason: Rejected because the review evidence describes an implementation bug, not a stable product constraint that should be documented as shared knowledge.

rejectedObservations.observation: Update `.factory/services.yaml` healthchecks because `curl` is unavailable in this environment.
rejectedObservations.reason: Rejected because current environment data shows `curl` is installed and the observation conflicts with the verified system context.
